module.title: Network related checks
module.description: Network related checks such as check_ping, check_tcp, check_dns, check_http, check_connections and check_ntp_offset.
module.name: CheckNet

commands.check_ping: Ping another host and check the result.
commands.check_tcp: Connect to a TCP port and optionally send/expect data to check that a service is reachable.
commands.check_dns: Resolve a host name and check the response time and resulting addresses.
commands.check_http: Send an HTTP/HTTPS request and check the response status, time, size and body.
commands.check_connections: Count active TCP/UDP connections and report counts per protocol and TCP state.
commands.check_ntp_offset: Query an NTP server and check the offset between the local clock and the server.
